shakshi: Sophia sat with the player and gave the major beats of human history — witness testimony, not scholarship
The player knows humanity attempted to destroy itself multiple times — in broad strokes, without the internal logic of why
Humanity came from Earth — space-faring colony species. Now explicit, not implied.
The player knows the broad shape of how humanity reached Aeralune — the arc without the texture of Games 1-6
Sophia has the facts without the phenomenology — she watched but was never inside the species. The player may notice the limit or may not.
The specific content of the prior six games was withheld deliberately — the arc is visible, the texture is not
Everything happening in Azonithia is downstream of a very long human story — the player now carries that frame
